Design_Description: Add single-layer depthwise-separable spatial context conv (no norm) to spatial tokens before cross-attention, with zero-init residual for baseline-equivalent start.
Add single-layer depthwise-separable spatial context conv with GroupNorm(32) to spatial tokens before cross-attention, with zero-init residual for baseline-equivalent start.
Add two-layer stacked depthwise-separable spatial context conv with GroupNorm(32), zero-init on final pointwise only, giving 5×5 effective receptive field over the spatial token grid.
